mapper.select: SELECT ID, BUSINESS_TYPE, FILE_BUCKET, FILE_PATH, FILE_SAVE_NAME, FILE_NAME, FILE_ICON, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, update_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM SYS_FILE WHERE ID = #{id}

SELECT SF.ID, SF.BUSINESS_TYPE, SF.FILE_BUCKET, SF.FILE_PATH, SF.FILE_SAVE_NAME, SF.FILE_NAME, SF.FILE_ICON, SF.CREATE_BY, SF.create_by_name, SF.CREATE_TIME, SF.UPDATE_BY, SF.update_BY_NAME, SF.UPDATE_TIME FROM SYS_FILE SF JOIN SYS_FILE_BUSINESS SFB ON SF.ID = SFB.FILE_ID WHERE SFB.BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId} AND SF.BUSINESS_TYPE = #{businessType}
SELECT FILE_ID FROM SYS_FILE_BUSINESS WHERE BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYS_FILE( ID, BUSINESS_TYPE, FILE_BUCKET, FILE_PATH, FILE_SAVE_NAME, FILE_NAME, FILE_ICON, FILE_SUFFIX, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME )values ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{businessType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileBucket,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{filePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileSaveName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileIcon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileSuffix, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now} )

INSERT INTO SYS_FILE( ID, BUSINESS_TYPE, FILE_BUCKET, FILE_PATH, FILE_SAVE_NAME, FILE_NAME, FILE_ICON, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME )values
#{file.id}, #{file.businessType}, #{file.fileBucket}, #{file.filePath}, #{file.fileSaveName}, #{file.fileName}, #{file.fileIcon}, #{file.loginUserId}, #{file.loginUserName}, #{file.now}
INSERT INTO SYS_FILE_BUSINESS( BUSINESS_ID, FILE_ID) VALUES( #{businessId}, #{fileId} )
